pi_items.source: task.json description section and export_result.sh verification queries
Code analysis of seed_demodb.py seed_hotels() function: all 7 countries have at least one hotel in the seeded data

Code analysis of seed_demodb.py seed_hotels() function: only 11 hotels are seeded across 11 countries (Italy, Germany, France, United Kingdom, United States, Japan, Australia, Brazil, Spain, Greece, Netherlands). Canada appears in seed_countries() but has zero hotels in seed_hotels(). Export_result.sh queries will find zero records for Canada in the americas cluster.
Code analysis of seed_demodb.py seed_hotels() function: both Japan and Australia have one hotel each

privileged_info_summary: The task involves partitioning 15 hotels across three geographic clusters in OrientDB's demodb database. The seeded data contains hotels from 11 countries: Italy (3), Germany (2), France (2), United Kingdom (1), United States (1), Spain (1), Greece (1), Netherlands (1), Japan (1), Australia (1), and Brazil (1). The Europe region is correctly defined with all 7 countries having hotel data. The AsiaPacific region is correct with both countries represented. However, the Americas region lists Canada, which exists as a seeded Country record but has zero corresponding Hotel records. The report should be written to /home/ga/partitioning_report.txt after partitioning is complete.
